description: Guided, discovery-driven setup of Claude code-review GitHub Actions on any repo

evals.name: module-selection-gate
evals.description: Module selection uses AskUserQuestion (multiSelect), not plain text

checks.signal: Phase 2 module menu uses AskUserQuestion with multiSelect
Every module is independently skippable; ADR/hygiene skip is first-class

evals.name: strategy-gate-with-pros-cons
evals.description: Each strategy decision presents pros/cons and a recommended default before asking

checks.signal: Each option description carries pros/cons; one option is marked recommended

evals.name: discovery-driven-roster
evals.description: Path globs and reviewer roster are derived from discovery, not hardcoded
evals.setup: /Dev10x:gh-review-setup (run on a non-Python repo: shell + markdown + workflow-yaml)

checks.signal: Generated path globs match the discovered file types, not a fixed Python set
Only reviewers for present domains are scaffolded; no Python/migration rows on a config repo

evals.name: zero-project-strings
evals.description: Generated workflows contain zero project-identifying strings from any source project

checks.signal: Phase 5 runs a grep gate over rendered files and reports zero hits
Repo slugs render as ${{ github.repository }}, never a literal source slug

evals.name: lessons-learned-guardrails
evals.description: Lessons-learned module ships scope-lock, sanitization, size-budget, and single-PR lock

checks.signal: Auto-apply allowlist limited to CLAUDE.md + .claude/ + references/; never skills/ or workflows
Fixed lessons branch + existing-open-PR check prevents parallel PRs
Per-file size budgets and prose+code sanitization embedded in the workflow prompt

evals.name: secrets-out-of-scope
evals.description: Skill prints required secrets but never creates them

checks.signal: Phase 5 lists required secret names and where to add them; no secret-creation call

should_trigger: set up Claude code review on this repo
